nasb.text: then you shall select for yourselves cities to be your cities of refuge, that the manslayer who has killed any person unintentionally may flee there.

esv.text: then you shall select cities to be cities of refuge for you, that the manslayer who kills any person without intent may flee there.

cnv.text: 就要選擇幾座城，給你們作避難城，讓誤殺人的，就是無心殺死人的，可以逃到那裡。

ccb.text: 要选一些城邑作为避难城，供误杀人者逃去避难，
